sentences.english: My guilty pleasure is watching reality TV shows.
sentences.korean: 남몰래 즐기는 것은 리얼리티 TV 프로그램을 보는 거예요.

sentences.english: I know they're trash but I can't stop watching them.
sentences.korean: 쓸데없는 줄 알지만 멈출 수가 없어요.

sentences.english: I eat ice cream straight from the container late at night.
I listen to cheesy pop songs from the nineties when I'm alone.
sentences.korean: 혼자 있을 때 90년대 유치한 팝송을 들어요.

sentences.english: I would never admit it to my friends though.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
